content: On the evening of October 15th, I was walking home from the temple after evening prayers. Around 8:45 PM, I saw Arjun Mehta standing near the temple gate, arguing loudly with a tall man wearing a hoodie. The man had a briefcase. I thought it was a property dispute — I didn’t get close. I didn’t see the man’s face. I told the police this in my initial statement. But later, I realized the lighting was poor and I may have confused him with someone else. I am sorry — I retract my statement. I was not sure. I didn’t see anything else.
